name: Moondream MCP
what_it_does: Moondream MCP server enabling AI agents to use Moondream — a tiny but capable vision language model that runs locally. Provides image understanding capabilities (describing images, answering questions about images, detecting objects) that can run on CPU or modest hardware. Enables privacy-preserving local image analysis without cloud API dependencies.
use_cases: Analyzing and describing images locally from computer vision agents
Answering questions about image content from multimodal analysis agents
Detecting objects and extracting information from images from document processing agents
Privacy-preserving image analysis where data cannot leave the machine from secure agents
Lightweight vision capabilities on edge hardware or constrained environments from edge agents
not_for: High-accuracy production vision tasks (use GPT-4 Vision, Claude's vision, or dedicated CV models for production)
Real-time video analysis (Moondream processes static images, not video streams)
Very large or complex visual reasoning tasks (Moondream is tiny — frontier models are more capable)
best_when: An agent needs basic image understanding locally without cloud dependencies — Moondream is small enough to run on CPU, making it accessible for privacy-conscious or resource-constrained deployments.
avoid_when: You need high-accuracy production vision — use Claude Vision, GPT-4V, or specialized computer vision models for mission-critical image analysis.

auth.notes: Local Moondream model: no authentication — runs on local hardware. Moondream cloud API: requires API key. Local model must be downloaded first.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Local Moondream model is completely free; cloud API has free tier
pricing.paid_tiers: Moondream cloud API paid plans for scale
pricing.notes: Local Moondream model is free — download model weights and run locally. Cloud API available for remote inference. MCP server is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: Local model: no rate limits; cloud API has rate limits

known_agent_gotchas: Initial model download required (~1-2 GB) — plan for first-run setup time
Moondream is small — accuracy is lower than frontier vision models; set appropriate expectations
CPU inference is slow (seconds per image) — GPU acceleration recommended for production
Image format support varies — ensure images are in supported formats (JPEG, PNG)
Community MCP — test with your specific image types before relying on for production
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local model: no network, no credentials, complete privacy. Images never leave the machine. Cloud mode: images sent to Moondream. Excellent for sensitive image data when using local mode.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local mode: complete privacy, no network. Cloud mode: images sent to Moondream. Excellent choice for private image analysis when local.
